title: leucheria hahnii var. lanata
intro: Leucheria hahnii var. lanata, also known as woolly Leucheria or woolly broom Leucheria, is a plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its woolly stems and leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Leucheria hahnii var. lanata include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, and it is often used in traditional medicine, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
